parameters.subject: ={{ $json.notification.subject }}
parameters.html:
=

{{ $json.notification.subject.replace('🚀 ', '') }}

{{ $json.notification.body.replace(/\n/g, '
') }}

Project: {{ $json.Name.title[0].plain_text }}

Current Status: {{ $json.Status.select.name }}

View Project Dashboard

Questions? Just reply to this email.

messages.content: Generate a personalized Loom video script for a project milestone update. Keep it under 2 minutes when spoken.

=Write a Loom video script for this project update:

Project: {{ $json.Name.title[0].plain_text }}
Status: {{ $json.Status.select.name }}
Client: {{ $json['Client Email'].email }}

The script should:
1. Greet the client by name
2. Announce the milestone
3. Explain what's been done
4. Outline next steps
5. Call to action

Keep it conversational and friendly.
